chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 2512 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ------------------------------------- 14.02.2025 None for applicant/accused Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh M/s Ghulam Akbar Punhoon Uqaili & Syed Masood Ahmed Shah Bukhri, advocates for complainant --------------------------- This is post arrest bail. Counsel for applicant is called absent. Counsel for complainant has pointed out that learned trial Court had examined all the witnesses and statement under section 342, Cr.PC of the accused has also been recorded. Since the case is at the verge of conclusion, neither bail can be granted nor rejected at this stage. In view of such position, this bail application is dismissed, however, learned trial Court is directed to decide the case of the applicant/accused expeditiously, preferably within a period of one months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
